title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
